summary: Checked advice inbox (empty) and current bridge state. The intended reimage1804_c02 strong-pi pODMR is still running/nonterminal as nv23_pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1_20260514_191847_reimage1804_c02_strong_podmr; no queue mutation was performed. A first saved autosave average was exported and reviewed: it shows a provisional signal-only dip near 3.875 GHz with raw/fitted-reference depth about 23%, close to the expected 22% strong-pi contrast, while the reference is not depressed. This is promising but not terminal evidence; state, backlog, lab log, note, figure, and evidence index were updated, and terminal 4-average review remains required before alignment/Ramsey/T2star/13C claims.

next_action.while_running: Do not mutate the bridge queue. Optional bridge-free autosave inspection is okay if new averages are available.
next_action.if_done: Export the final savedexperiment, plot raw signal/reference plus fitted-reference and pointwise normalization views, and decide whether reimage1804_c02 has a clear usable resonance for magnetic-field alignment before any Ramsey/T2star/13C work.
next_action.if_failed_before_data: Record as count/freshness or route evidence; do not call it no-resonance; decide retrack/re-image/fallback from evidence.
next_action.if_no_clear_resonance: Reject reimage1804_c02 and move to reimage1804_c03.
next_action.if_clear_resonance: Focus on reimage1804_c02 and verify/advisory the conditional Ramsey/T2star/13C plan before execute; use about 2 MHz Ramsey detuning on the 0..8 us / 51-point scout unless terminal pODMR evidence motivates redesign.
